So, those two fields are permitted by

did it as a school district project
because we did JSCB phase 2 projects at

it's real questionable
the safety of them. I've cut a PO for
what we call a G test.

there was a rural school district that
used what they call the piggybacking

Um so, what happened was there was a

and a judge said, "You didn't
competitively com um get that work. You
